productDisplayName: Fastrack Men Bikers Analog Steel Brown Watch
description: An absolute delight for the man who loves to live off the heavy metal, this analog wrist watch from the fastrack Biker& rsquo s collection is to-die-for. Differently designed and with a rugged sporty look, it& rsquo s a must have for all those who love to kick off the roads in style.Case diameter: 50 mmCase thickness: 9 mmDial shape: Round and modified Steel case with a fixed designer bezel for added durability, style and comfort Leather strap with a tang clasp for comfort and style Two dials with a black and white design, with the bigger one displaying the hours and minutes, markings of which are engraved on the bezel, and the smaller one displaying the seconds Luminescent hands and numbers for easy viewing of time in low light conditions Quartz movement of time display Two separate screws for each display to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance at 50 meters, allowing you to use it even when swimming
